presentation.summary: Submit Silo movie and series requests directly to a riven-rs instance.
presentation.description_markdown: Connects Silo to [riven-rs](https://github.com/rivenmedia/riven-rs) using its native GraphQL request API (`requestMovie` / `requestShow`), so requests can be fulfilled without routing through Seerr. Riven tracks and scrapes the request itself; the plugin only submits it and reports back status derived from the resulting media item's state.
presentation.setup_markdown: Install the plugin and add a Riven connection in Silo with the riven-rs API base URL (e.g. `http://localhost:8080`) and the value of `RIVEN_SETTING__API_KEY` configured on that instance. Requests are submitted under a trusted service identity; riven has no per-user approval queue, so every request is accepted immediately and left for riven's own indexing/scraping pipeline to fulfill.

capabilities.description: Fulfill content requests directly against a riven-rs instance's GraphQL API.
